fault_hypothesis: The check on line 69 uses a strict greater-than comparison ('>') instead of greater-than-or-equal ('>='), incorrectly allowing login attempts when the number of recent attempts is exactly equal to the limit.

constraints.intent: The buggy logic fails specifically when the number of recent attempts is exactly equal to the limit.
The 'allow' branch should only be taken when the number of attempts is strictly less than the limit.

spec.expr: all(t > cutoff__1 for t in recent__1)

constraints.intent: All timestamps in the 'recent' list must actually be more recent than the cutoff time.
